codeReview.summary: Step 2 UI/card requirements are implemented, and pantry-aware prompting is present, but the API implementation does not satisfy the feature's required streaming approach for AI idea generation.

issues.description: The route calls `generateText` and returns a buffered JSON payload instead of using `streamText` streaming as required by the feature description and mission conventions for AI route handlers.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Streaming AI route behavior is documented in both mission AGENTS guidance and architecture, but this non-streaming implementation still passed worker validation; shared-state/process lacks an enforcement mechanism to catch streamText-vs-generateText violations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md AI section requires `streamText()` for route handlers; architecture.md invariant says all AI endpoints stream; commit 4127f38 uses `generateText` in src/app/api/generate/ideas/route.ts:97.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill mandates TDD (failing tests first), but this run implemented route/component code before adding/updating tests, suggesting either enforcement drift or procedure mismatch with actual workflow.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows Edit/Create on src/app/api/generate/ideas/route.ts, src/components/idea-cards.tsx, and src/app/generate/page.tsx before creating src/app/api/generate/ideas/route.test.ts and src/components/idea-cards.test.tsx.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, and commit 4127f38 diff for generation-ai-ideas. Found one blocking issue: the ideas API is implemented as non-streaming (`generateText`) instead of required streaming behavior. Report marked fail.
